data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: All data transferred over Google's services is encrypted by default.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes TLS 1.3 for secure data transmission.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Strong protections against Distributed Denial of Service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Cloud Armor and advanced threat detection algorithms.

data.title: Advanced Threat Analysis
data.description: Machine learning models for identifying potential security threats.
data.technical_spec: Custom algorithms monitor traffic and flag anomalies.

data.title: Identity and Access Management
data.description: Robust identity verification and access management practices.
data.technical_spec: OAuth 2.0 and Multi-Factor Authentication for secure access control.

data.title: Zero Trust Security
data.description: Google applies zero trust security models to limit access threats.
data.technical_spec: User and device-based authentication and authorization.
